missing_for_next_class.rationale: No civil sheet exists. The narrative mentions 2.5M CY earthwork but provides no drawing. A grading plan with spot elevations and drainage routing is required for Class 4.

missing_for_next_class.deliverable: Gross floor plans for all 4 buildings
missing_for_next_class.rationale: No architectural floor plans exist. The IFC has one building storey entity with no room or zone layout. Floor plans for all 4 buildings are required for Class 4.

missing_for_next_class.deliverable: Electrical one-line diagram with gross MW allocation
missing_for_next_class.rationale: No electrical sheet exists. 'Dual MV substation feed' is a program bullet. A one-line showing gross MW per building and substation configuration is required for Class 4.
No mechanical sheet exists. '4 chillers' is a program bullet. A block diagram showing chiller plant, cooling tower, and distribution topology is required for Class 4.
No equipment schedule of any kind exists. A list of major mechanical and electrical equipment with approximate capacities is required for Class 4.

top_5_rows.description: Hyperscale data center, all-in parametric ($/MW), 96 MW IT capacity
top_5_rows.notes: Includes structure, shell, MEP, IT-ready fit-out, sitework, central energy plant, MV electrical. Excludes IT/server hardware, owner soft costs, land. Class 5 parametric only — no quantity takeoff supports this row.
top_5_rows.source_citation: QPB1-Concept-Site-Plan.pdf page 1 (96 MW program target); cost library v0.1.0-smoke row 01 00 00 (llm_estimate)

top_5_rows.description: Mass earthwork, sitework cross-check (informational; subsumed in $/MW)
top_5_rows.notes: Cross-check only. Narrative-stated 2.5M CY at $12.5/CY = $31.25M, which is ~3% of the $/MW envelope and consistent with Class 5 expectations. NOT added to total (avoid double-count).
top_5_rows.source_citation: QPB1-Concept-Site-Plan.pdf page 1 ('estimated 2.5M CY mass earthwork'); cost library v0.1.0-smoke row 31 00 00 (llm_estimate)

top_5_activities.name: Design completion through DD/CD
top_5_activities.notes: Pre-NTP design progression from current Class 5 concept to construction documents.

top_5_activities.name: Notice to Proceed
top_5_activities.notes: Assumed 2026-09-01. Overlap with design CD phase.

top_5_activities.name: Permitting and utility coordination
top_5_activities.notes: Site, building, stormwater permits; utility interconnect application.

top_5_activities.name: Mass earthwork (2.5M CY)
top_5_activities.notes: Includes detention basin. 5x10 calendar with weather allowance.

top_5_activities.name: Building shells DC-1 through DC-4 (paired, parallel)
top_5_activities.notes: DC-1/DC-2 in pair 1, DC-3/DC-4 in pair 2 with 6-month offset. CP runs through DC-1 (earliest commission).
